title: Simply Moar Armor!
body:
Ever dreamed of Emerald or Cobblestone Armor But MOJANG JUST WONT ADD IT?

Well I will:

Adds: Emerald gear tier (Between Diamond and Netherite)

Cobblestone Tier (Complete Crap For Noobs) 

tip* Emerald Gear is Crafted like normal gear, and so is cobblestone

If netherite is to hard for you to get and diamond is just too weak use emerald gear

And if you cant get iron earlygame use cobblestone armor

 

Made With MCreator By _Sevaisbetter_
 

Enjoy !

Curseforge Link:[Sevaisbetter | Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/sevaisbetter/projects)
